review_basis: Frozen case rubrics; activation comes only from raw read events; wording and formatting are not scored.

failing_case_for_all_arms.reason: Every arm gave a stop, pause, or hold posture before acquiring answer-changing context; the frozen rubric required no direction and exactly one blocking question.

decision_context.reason: Only the 895-byte gate loaded; the final response gave no posture and asked one answer-changing compound question.

clear_mpg.reason: The gate loaded despite the frozen clear-owner negative control and replaced the required same-turn MPG path action with an RPO blocking question.
